description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a complex hip roof covered in brown shingles and a light-colored exterior. The house features a combination of white and light blue wall panels, with stone trim along the base. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically around the structure, and the main entryway is sheltered by a small overhanging roof with a single step leading up to the door. The property sits on a rectangular green lawn, bordered on one side by white fence panels. The overall design is simple yet functional, with a focus on practicality and modest decorative elements.
description: A single-story house with a brown hip roof, white and blue exterior walls, stone trim, and asymmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a partial white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two windows, and a small step, with the white and blue wall panels and stone trim visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the complex hip roof structure, additional windows, and decorative wall panels, with interior images displayed on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a smaller entryway with a single step, a prominent roof overhang, and minimal window presence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying a large window, a small window, and the continuation of the stone trim and hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single step, sheltered by a small overhanging roof, and a simple door with minimal decorative elements.
